title: Free Camera
description: Free camera rotation and adjustable zoom in third-person mode.
body:
Take full command of your camera with **freecam**, **orbit**, **tripod**, **cinematic** modes, **roll**, **zoom**, and more — all in one lightweight Fabric mod.

---

## Features

### Freecam
Detach the camera from your character and fly freely through the world. Move with WASD, look with the mouse, and scroll to adjust speed. Press Space to go up, Shift to go down.

### Orbit
Press F6 while in third-person (F5) to orbit around your character. Drag the mouse to orbit 360°, scroll to adjust distance (1.5–20 blocks), and zoom in with V.

### Tripod Lock (F7)
Freeze the camera in place and take back control of your character. Move around freely while the camera stays locked on the scene. Press F7 again to release. Works in both freecam and orbit.

### Cinematic Mode (F8)
Smooth, natural camera transitions. Adjust the smoothing strength in settings.

### Roll (Z / C)
Tilt the camera around its viewing axis. The roll increment is configurable from 0.5° to 45°. Mouse movement stays screen-aligned regardless of tilt.

### Zoom (V)
Hold V to zoom in. Adjust the zoom factor in settings.

### Reset (R)
Freecam: return the camera to its starting position. Orbit: snap back behind the player.

---

## Controls

| Key | Action |
|-----|--------|
| F6 | Toggle freecam / orbit |
| F7 | Toggle tripod lock |
| F8 | Toggle cinematic mode |
| F9 | Open settings |
| R | Reset camera position |
| WASD | Freecam movement |
| Space / Shift | Freecam up / down |
| Mouse | Look around / orbit |
| Scroll | Adjust speed / orbit distance |
| V (hold) | Zoom |
| Z / C | Roll left / right |

---

## Settings (F9)

| Category | Setting | Range | Description |
|----------|---------|-------|-------------|
| **Flight** | Flight Speed | 0.1x – 10x | Freecam movement speed |
| | Scroll Speed | 1.05x – 3x | How fast speed changes per scroll tick |
| | Show Speed | ON / OFF | Show speed in the action bar on scroll |
| **Camera Control** | Mouse Sensitivity | 0.1x – 5x | General camera look sensitivity |
| | Orbit Sensitivity | 0.05x – 5x | Orbit mode look sensitivity |
| | Invert Orbit Y | ON / OFF | Invert vertical orbit axis |
| | Roll Increment | 0.5° – 45° | Degrees of roll per key press |
| **Camera** | Smoothing Factor | 0.01 – 0.50 | Cinematic transition smoothness |
| | Zoom Factor | 0.05x – 1x | Zoom magnification level |

---

## Additional Details

- **F5 safety**: Switching camera perspective auto-deactivates the mod
- **Fullbright**: Automatic night vision while active
- **NoClip**: The player entity ignores physics in freecam mode
- **HUD hiding**: Hotbar, boss bar, scoreboard, and overlays are hidden
- **ModMenu**: Settings are accessible through ModMenu

---

**Developer:** Cukkoo  
**Version:** 2.1.0  
**License:** MIT
